items.title: [正面] Very fun game. Haven't played too long yet but the...
items.summary: Very fun game. Haven't played too long yet but the general gameplay loop has been very addicting! Artstyle/general visuals are amazing as well.
items.review: Very fun game. Haven't played too long yet but the general gameplay loop has been very addicting! Artstyle/general visuals are amazing as well.

items.title: [正面] There is a good story buried in the mire of bad AI...
items.summary:
There is a good story buried in the mire of bad AI translation but you'd be able to understand it.
Good music par with artwork and a card battle game like slay the spire or Chaos Zero Nightmare.
Its free, give it a try
